dimensions.requirement: mixed insert/delete/lookup workload across disjoint AND overlapping subtrees
dimensions.covered_by: TestConcurrentMixedWorkload: insertOnly/deleteOnly/mutate role-ranges are disjoint by key index (no overlap between roles); mutate goroutines force splits+merges repeatedly in their own region while lookup goroutines scan the ENTIRE keyspace (including actively-mutating ranges) throughout, giving genuine physical overlap at the node/leaf level even though the oracle partition is logically disjoint by key

dimensions.requirement: final tree state matches an oracle
dimensions.covered_by: static, scheduling-independent partition of key indices into insertOnly/deleteOnly/mutate roles with collision-proof fileID(i,v)=i*10+v encoding; wantPresent/wantAbsent computed directly from the partition, verified via assertAllLookupable (free Lookup), a Tree.Lookup cross-check, assertAbsent, assertStructuralInvariants(exact wantKeyCount), assertNoOrphanedPointers
all self-consistency go test invocations run with -race; full existing suite + 5x repeat of exact test-spec invocation + extra solo repeats

dimensions.requirement: lookups never error/panic/corrupt during concurrent mutation
dimensions.covered_by: every Tree.Lookup call in the lookup goroutines is checked inline: err must be nil; if found, fileID must be a member of that key's precomputed validFileIDs set (corruption-by-construction detection via disjoint fileID encoding), reported through an error channel drained after wg.Wait()
80,000 total keys, 160 write-side goroutines (60+60+40) + 40 continuous lookup goroutines = 200 total concurrent goroutines

dimensions.requirement: explicit -timeout on every go test invocation
dimensions.covered_by: self-consistency step 6 uses -timeout on every invocation (10m full suite, 20m 5x repeat, generous solo-repeat timeouts)
post-workload validation step 4 (plan.md) checks every wantPresent key via both APIs

dimensions.requirement: deterministic coverage of a specific known-tricky interleaving (design guidance item 5)
dimensions.covered_by: TestConcurrentMixedWorkloadForcedLookupDuringDelete: hook-based forced pause of Tree.Lookup mid-read, concurrent Tree.Delete mutates the exact same node, forced version-mismatch retry verified via optimisticRetryHook

dimensions.requirement: reuse existing helpers rather than reinvent
dimensions.covered_by: newTestStoreAndAllocator, genKey, insertN, assertAllLookupable, assertAbsent, assertStructuralInvariants, assertNoOrphanedPointers, optimisticReadHook/optimisticRetryHook all reused verbatim from insert_test.go/delete_test.go/lookup_test.go
